About Us

Meet Taman
Aggarwal

"Insurance is not just a policy — it's a promise I make to protect what matters most to you."
👤
ADD YOUR PHOTO HERE
Replace with <img src="taman.jpg">

With over a decade of expertise in the insurance industry, Taman Aggarwal has helped 500+ families and businesses across India find the right coverage at the most competitive prices. Based in Chandigarh with a Pan India reach, Taman Care Insurance Services is built on trust, transparency, and dedicated client service.

We partner with 20+ leading insurance companies including HDFC ERGO, ICICI Lombard, Star Health, Bajaj Allianz, and Tata AIG — giving you the power of choice, backed by expert guidance.

500+
Happy Clients
20+
Insurance Partners
10+
Years Experience

What We Offer

Our Services

Comprehensive insurance solutions tailored to protect every aspect of your life and business.

🏥

Health Insurance

Comprehensive medical coverage for individuals and families with cashless hospitalization across India.

  • Cashless treatment at 10,000+ hospitals
  • Pre & post hospitalization coverage
  • Critical illness protection
  • Zero waiting period plans available
Get Quote →
🚗

Car Insurance

Complete vehicle protection with third-party and comprehensive plans at industry-best rates.

  • Instant policy issuance
  • Zero depreciation add-on
  • 24/7 roadside assistance
  • Cashless garage network
Get Quote →
🏍️

Bike Insurance

Protect your two-wheeler with affordable plans covering accidents, theft, and third-party liability.

  • Starting at just ₹1,300/year
  • Own damage coverage
  • Personal accident cover
  • Hassle-free online renewal
Get Quote →
🚛

Commercial Insurance

Fleet and commercial vehicle insurance for trucks, autos, taxis and all goods carriers.

  • Goods in transit coverage
  • Driver & passenger safety
  • Third-party liability
  • Competitive fleet discounts
Get Quote →
🛡️

Life Term Insurance

Secure your family's future with high-cover term life plans at the lowest premiums — pure protection, no compromise.

  • Cover up to ₹5 Crore+
  • Starting at ₹500/month
  • 99%+ claim settlement ratio
  • Critical illness rider available
Get Quote →
👨‍👩‍👧

Family Floater Health

One policy covering your entire family — spouse, children, and parents — with a shared sum insured at the best price.

  • Entire family under one plan
  • Sum insured up to ₹1 Crore
  • Maternity & newborn cover
  • Restore benefit on exhaustion
Get Quote →
🔄

Insurance Renewal

Don't let your policy lapse. Quick, paperless renewal in minutes — we handle everything for you.

  • Renewal in under 10 minutes
  • No-claim bonus protection
  • Compare & upgrade coverage
  • Reminder service included
Renew Now →
📋

Claim Support

We stand by you through the entire claims process — from filing to final settlement.

  • Dedicated claim assistance
  • Document support
  • Direct insurer coordination
  • Fast-track settlement help
Get Help →
💬

Free Consultation

Not sure what coverage you need? Get a free, no-obligation consultation from our expert advisors.

  • Personalized risk assessment

  • Unbiased recommendations

Claim Assistance

We Fight for Your Claim

PolicyBazaar is faceless. We are not. When you file a claim, Taman Aggarwal personally guides you through every step — so you never feel alone.

1
Call Us Immediately

Reach out the moment an incident occurs — accident, hospitalisation, or damage. We're available 24/7 to start the process.

2
We Guide the Paperwork

No confusing forms. We tell you exactly which documents are needed, help you fill them correctly, and submit everything on time.

3
We Follow Up with Insurer

We speak directly with the insurer on your behalf — tracking status, resolving queries, and pushing for faster processing.

4
Claim Resolved ✓

You receive your settlement. No surprises, no rejections without a fight. We stay with you until the very end.

🛡️

Our Claim Promise

While big portals give you a policy number and disappear, we stand by you through the hardest moments. Your claim is our fight.

99%
Claim Success Rate
24/7
Claim Support
500+
Claims Assisted
📞 Call for Claim Help

Available 24/7 for emergencies. For non-urgent queries, Mon–Sat 9AM–7PM.

Got Questions?

Frequently Asked Questions

Most cashless health claims settle in 24–48 hours. Reimbursement claims take 7–15 days. Car/bike claims typically settle in 3–7 working days. We follow up with insurers on your behalf at every step.
Yes. You can switch at every renewal without losing your No Claim Bonus. For health, your waiting period carries over too. We handle the full portability process at zero extra cost.
You'll typically need: RC, Driving Licence, Insurance Policy, FIR (if theft/third-party), and repair estimates. We tell you exactly what's needed for your specific case and help you fill every form.
Nothing at all. Consultation, comparison and claim support are 100% free. We earn a commission from the insurer — you get expert service at the same price as buying directly, usually cheaper.
Yes — through a Family Floater (one sum insured for all) or a separate Senior Citizen plan for parents above 60. We recommend the best fit based on age, health, and budget.
We fight it. We help you file a formal grievance with the insurer, and if needed escalate to the IRDAI Bima Bharosa portal or Insurance Ombudsman. We have reversed several rejections for our clients.
💬 Have another question? Ask on WhatsApp →

Never Miss a Renewal

Set Your Free
Renewal Reminder

A lapsed policy means zero coverage at the worst moment. We'll remind you 30, 15, and 7 days before your policy expires — by call or WhatsApp, whichever you prefer.

  • 📅
    3-Step Reminder System

    We alert you at 30 days, 15 days, and 7 days before expiry — so you're never caught off guard.

  • 💰
    Protect Your No-Claim Bonus

    Lapsing even by 1 day can wipe out years of NCB. We ensure you renew on time and keep every rupee saved.

  • 🤝
    Personal Follow-Up

    Unlike automated bots, Taman personally calls clients. You get real advice, not just a reminder SMS.

Set My Reminder

Fill in your details below — completely free, no obligation. We'll reach out before your policy expires.
